title: ITC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ITC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
